name: Raw Disk Read / Block Device Creation
description: Raw disk read via dd if=/dev/sdX or block device creation via mknod — bypasses filesystem permissions to extract secrets from raw disk blocks. Used in container escape attacks to read host disk data. Technique observed in strapi-plugin-cron / strapi-plugin-events supply-chain attack.

patterns.message: Raw disk read via dd if=/dev/sdX — bypasses filesystem permissions to extract secrets from raw disk blocks.
Raw disk read via dd if=/dev/nvmeX — bypasses filesystem permissions to extract secrets from raw disk blocks.
Block device creation via mknod — creates raw disk access device for host data extraction from container.
